entries.definition:
كتاب الباء

برج - برح

(برج) الباء والراء والجيم أصلان: أحدهما البُروز والظُّهور،والآخر الوَزَرُ والملجأ. فمن الأوّل البَرَج وهو سَعَة العين في شدّةِ سوادِ سَوادِها وشدّة [بياض] بياضها، ومنه التّبرُّج، وهو إظهار المرأةِ مَحاسِنَها.

والأصل الثاني البُرْجُ واحِدُ بُروجِ السّماء. وأصل البرُوج الحُصونُ والقُصور قال الله تعالى: ] وَلَوْ كُنْتُمْ في بُرُوجٍ مُشَيَّدَةٍ [ [النساء 78]. ويقال ثوبٌ مُبَرَّجٌ إذا كان عليه صور البُرُوج.

exemption, revocation, rescinding, abrogation (9:1) براءة من الله ورسوله إلى الذين عاهدتم من المشركين release from obligation [is proclaimed] from God and His Messenger to those of the polytheists with whom you made a treaty; * براءة name of Sura 9, Medinan sura, so-named because of the reference in verse 1 to ‘the Release from Obligation’, also called ʾal-Tawba (see ت/و/ب t-w-b).
برية bariyyatun [n./pass. part.] the entire creation (98:7) إن الذين آمنوا وعملوا الصالحات أولئك هم خير البرية those who believe and do good deeds are the best of creation.

بارئ bāriʾ [act. part.] Maker, Creator (2:54) فتوبوا إلى بارئكم so repent to your Maker *(59:24) البارئ [attribute of God] the Creator, the Initiator, the Maker.

مبرؤون mubarraʾūn [pl. of pass. part. مبرأ mubarraʾ] exonerated, absolved, declared innocent (24:26) أولئك مبرؤون مما يقولون those are innocent of what they [the slanderers] say.
entries.definition_english:
exemption, revocation, rescinding, abrogation (9:1) براءة من الله ورسوله إلى الذين عاهدتم من المشركين release from obligation [is proclaimed] from God and His Messenger to those of the polytheists with whom you made a treaty; * براءة name of Sura 9, Medinan sura, so-named because of the reference in verse 1 to ‘the Release from Obligation’, also called ʾal-Tawba (see ت/و/ب t-w-b).
برية bariyyatun [n./pass. part.] the entire creation (98:7) إن الذين آمنوا وعملوا الصالحات أولئك هم خير البرية those who believe and do good deeds are the best of creation.

بارئ bāriʾ [act. part.] Maker, Creator (2:54) فتوبوا إلى بارئكم so repent to your Maker *(59:24) البارئ [attribute of God] the Creator, the Initiator, the Maker.

مبرؤون mubarraʾūn [pl. of pass. part. مبرأ mubarraʾ] exonerated, absolved, declared innocent (24:26) أولئك مبرؤون مما يقولون those are innocent of what they [the slanderers] say.

entries.definition:
b-r-j height; prominence; beauty of the eyes; tower; signs of the zodiac; fortification; (of women) to display their charm. Of this root, three forms occur seven times in the Qur’an: تبرجن tabarrajna twice; متبرجات mutabarrijāt once and بروج burūj four times.
تبرجن tabarrajna [imperf. of v. V تبرجن tabarrajna with the imperfect prefix ت elided, intrans.] [said only of women] to adorn themselves in an enticing way, in a lust-causing way; to expose themselves in an alluring way (33:33) وقرن في بيوتكن ولا تبرجن تبرج الجاهلية الأولى stay in your houses, and do not display your finery in the way of the pagans of old.

متبرجات mutabarrijāt [pl. of act. part. fem. متبرجة mutabarrijatun] (said only of women) those who flaunt their bodies in an alluring way, display their adornment enticingly (24:60) والقواعد من النساء اللاتي لا يرجون نكاحا فليس عليهن جناح أن يضعن ثيابهن غير متبرجات بزينة such women as are past childbearing who have no hope of marriage, there is no blame on them if they take off their [outer] garments, without however, flaunting their

86

تبرجن tabarrajna [imperf. of v. متبرجات mutabarrijāt [pl. of act. part. fem. متبرجة mutabarrijatun] (said only of women) those who flaunt their bodies in an alluring way, display their adornment enticingly (24:60) والقواعد من النساء اللاتي لا يرجون نكاحا فليس عليهن جناح أن يضعن ثيابهن غير متبرجات بزينة such women as are past childbearing who have no hope of marriage, there is no blame on them if they take off their [outer] garments, without however, flaunting their

86

entries.definition:
charms.
بروج burūj [pl. of بُرْج burj] 1 tower, castle (4:78) أينما تكونوا يدرككم الموت ولو كنتم في بروج مشيدة wherever you may be, death will overtake you, even if you are inside lofty towers 2 positions of the sun, moon and planets, constellations; signs of the zodiac (15:16) ولقد جعلنا في السماء بروجاً وزيناها للناظرين We have set constellations up in the sky and made it beautiful for the beholders; * البروج name of Sura 85, Meccan sura, so-named because of the reference in verse 1 to ‘the Constellations’.
entries.definition_english:
charms.
بروج burūj [pl. of بُرْج burj] 1 tower, castle (4:78) أينما تكونوا يدرككم الموت ولو كنتم في بروج مشيدة wherever you may be, death will overtake you, even if you are inside lofty towers 2 positions of the sun, moon and planets, constellations; signs of the zodiac (15:16) ولقد جعلنا في السماء بروجاً وزيناها للناظرين We have set constellations up in the sky and made it beautiful for the beholders; * البروج name of Sura 85, Meccan sura, so-named because of the reference in verse 1 to ‘the Constellations’.
